productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Strawberry Lemonade - 2pk (2x0.5g)
description: A sativa infused joint built on Strawberrry Lemonade and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, strawberry, and rose, delivering a clear, creative buzz. Pace yourself.
